> **Governance lineage:** this repository inherits the EGOS universal rules published at
> `github.com/enioxt/egos-governance`. The rules below are the public-safe subset; the canonical
> public source is authoritative on conflict. Repo-specific addenda live in `AGENTS.md`.

## Universal rules (public-safe subset)

- **No force-push** to main/master/production/release/hotfix.
- **No secret logging** — never print env var values; never commit `.env`.
- **No `git add -A`** in background agents — stage specific files only.
- **Evidence-first** — a claim without proof (test, metric, reproducible run) is invalid.
- **SSOT-first** — content goes to the existing canonical file, never a new duplicate.
- **Verify before reference** — grep/glob that a file/function exists before relying on it.
